query_normalized: understanding oceanic phytoplankton communities through remote sensing and oceanographic data ocean science
rationale: The paper focuses on a general-purpose AI framework for interpreting surface changes in remote sensing imagery (e.g., urban expansion, deforestation) and does not measure oceanic phytoplankton communities, specific oceanographic variables, or the biological mechanisms of marine ecosystems.
